name: officeimo-document-tools
description: Codex skills for OfficeIMO document conversion, PDF retirement work, and the OfficeIMO.com browser conversion path.

interface.shortDescription: Work on OfficeIMO conversion, PDF, WASM, and PSWriteOffice retirement tasks.
interface.longDescription: OfficeIMO Document Tools gives Codex a repo-owned operating surface for document conversion work. It keeps reusable behavior in OfficeIMO core, keeps website and PowerShell surfaces thin, and separates static browser conversion from local MCP automation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the OfficeIMO document tools skills for conversion, PDF, website/WASM, and PSWriteOffice retirement work.
